Our Academicians and Students were at the IEEE World Haptics Conference!

Dr. Lecturer Mine Saraç-Stroppa from our Mechatronic Engineering Department, Dr. Lecturer Fabio Stroppa from our Computer Engineering Department and our undergraduate students Nizamettin Taha Tanaçar (Electrical-Electronics Eng.), Ümit Şen (Mechatronics Eng.), Şafak Gün (Computer Eng.), Hüseyin Taner Yüksel (Computer Eng.) and Moaaz Hudhud (Mechatronics Eng.) attended the “IEEE World Haptics Conference” held in Delft, the Netherlands between July 10-13.
